package rulefixtures

import (
	"strings"
)

// scenario for go_perf_layer_string_handling_string_lower_for_case_insensitive_compare: Layer: String handling. Flag strings.ToLower comparisons where EqualFold avoids extra allocation.
// fixture polarity: negative; family: performance; severity: contextual.
func scenario597Negative(haystack string, needle string, left string, right string) bool {
	return left == right
}
